text:
The Hoihoi Hotel (ホイホイホテル, Hoihoi Hoteru) is a hotel in the Kakin Empire. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 350 

Overview

The Hoihoi Hotel is one of the many hotels owned by the Kakin Royal Family. 

Plot

Sucession War arc

After applying to join the Kakin Empire's royal bodyguard squads, both Hanzo and Basho received an immediate reply to meet at the Hoihoi Hotel at 7 P.M. 

Trivia

Miscellaneous

In the hawaiian dictionary, "Hoihoi" means "joy" and "cheerfulness".

References
